layout_strategies.global: Sticky header with gradient background. Responsive layout: 1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3-4 col desktop for grids. Generous padding in containers.
layout_strategies.header: Gradient from #166534 to #15803d, glassmorphism if sticky over content, text in white. Includes school logo and system name.
layout_strategies.footer: Dark or light background with large Arabic verse 'خَيْرُكُمْ مَنْ تَعَلَّمَ القُرْآنَ وَعَلَّمَهُ' in Amiri font centered, text-2xl or 3xl.
layout_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background, subtle border, no heavy shadow unless hovered. Use Neumorphism/Tactile variant for quick action buttons.

component_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons use #166534. Mode selectors use subdued variants unless active. Status buttons (Mumtaz, Jayyid, Daif) use solid bright colors when active.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn based. 1px border #e2e8f0, focus ring using #166534.
component_guidelines.tables: Clean lines, hover states on rows, clear status badges.
component_guidelines.toast: Sonner for toasts. Success (Green), Error (Red), Warning (Amber).
component_guidelines.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) for Prestasi Pelajar. Use primary and secondary colors.

images.description: Subtle Islamic pattern for page backgrounds or card accents
Premium Quran hero image for welcome areas

specific_pages.homepage: Buletin Utama as a prominent card or feed. 4 main navigation buttons presented in a Bento Grid layout. Status box highlighting missing submissions.
specific_pages.rekod_harian: Tabs for mode tasmi'. 5 halaqahs selection. Complex grid for Juzuk (1-30) and Surah - use compact layout. Large clear result buttons (Mumtaz, Jayyid, Daif).
specific_pages.dashboard: Top students and halaqah rankings. Overall achievement bar chart. Weak students list.
specific_pages.laporan_halaqah: Monthly report view with stats and comments. Button for PDF export.
specific_pages.prestasi_pelajar: Line graphs tracking student performance over time.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Subtle hover lifts for cards (-translate-y-1). Smooth tab transitions. Skeleton loaders for data fetching.
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: High contrast text. aria-labels on icon buttons. data-testid on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a clean, SaaS-like dashboard but with a premium educational feel. Use the provided colors. Ensure all Arabic text uses the Amiri font. Use lucide-react for icons. The logo should be placed in the header. Use shadcn components extensively for tables, forms, and charts.
